title: 10 best herbal essential oils for cough
description: Matricaria chamomilla, also known as chamomile, essential oils helps with cough because of its soothing and anti-inflammatory properties. The oil's apigenin and chamazulene compounds have natural expectorant qualities that help loosen and clear mucus from the airways. This helps to reduce coughing spasms and makes it easier to breathe. Additionally, chamomile's calming effects can help to alleviate stress and anxiety that can exacerbate coughing, promoting a more peaceful and restful r...
